Fermi Math & Geometry.context_clue: A day has 24 hours, each hour has 60 minutes, each minute has 60 seconds.
A standard year has 365 days, each day has 24 hours, each hour has 60 minutes.
A standard large pizza is cut into exactly 8 equal slices.

Fermi Math & Geometry.item_title: Total dots on 10 standard six-sided dice
Fermi Math & Geometry.context_clue: A single standard die has faces numbered 1 through 6.

Fermi Math & Geometry.item_title: Internal angles sum of a decagon
Fermi Math & Geometry.context_clue: A decagon has 10 sides. The sum of interior angles is (n-2)*180 degrees.
One gallon has 4 quarts, one quart has 2 pints, one pint has 2 cups, one cup has 8 fluid ounces.
A mile is 1609.34 meters, and one meter contains exactly 100 centimeters. Round to nearest thousand.
A standard grand piano has exactly 88 keys (52 white and 36 black).
